rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption is unrelated to §11.146, which governs mineral interest exemptions under $500. No overlap or interaction between the provisions.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of a mineral interest the person owns if the interest has a taxable value of less than $500.
_note: §11.146 addresses mineral interest exemptions; proposed change targets residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b). No conflict.
